subcodes.first_line: O thou who art eager to behold His countenance! Every head hath its secret, and every heart its desire and longing. If thou art truly among the people of mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق دیدار هر سری را سریست و هر دلی را هوس و هواای تو اگر از اهل سر
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
